mapper.select: select h.*, u.real_name as handler_user_name from biz_finance_anomaly_handle h left join sys_user u on u.id = h.handler_user_id where h.deleted = 0 and h.anomaly_type = #{anomalyType} and h.order_id = #{orderId} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into biz_finance_anomaly_handle( anomaly_type, order_id, settlement_id, handle_status, handle_comment, handler_user_id, handle_time, create_time, update_time, deleted ) values ( #{anomalyType}, #{orderId}, #{settlementId}, #{handleStatus}, #{handleComment}, #{handlerUserId}, #{handleTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, 0 ) on duplicate key update settlement_id = values(settlement_id), handle_status = values(handle_status), handle_comment = values(handle_comment), handler_user_id = values(handler_user_id), handle_time = values(handle_time), update_time = values(update_time), deleted = 0
